notes: Forest, infantry, and economy specialist base — the map's sole example of its kind, found in a large forest biome; all of its buildings can be placed on forest as well as the usual terrain. Its exclusive production building fields a fast, lightweight scout vehicle able to cross terrain other land vehicles can't; a shared infantry-training building gives it its own foot-soldier roster too. Its specialty defense carries over a rapid-fire, swarm-clearing identity suited to its fast, lightly-armed garrison. Gets a strong boost to its wood production.
